items.claim: Felipe Franco has a 10-0 record in fights ending in round one.
items.quote: Felipe Franco in fights that end in round one 10 and0.

items.claim: Felipe Franco has a 0-2 record in fights that go past round one.
items.quote: In fights that go past round one, he's 0 and2.

items.claim: Steuart Little has been finished in two of his four UFC fights.
items.quote: This is his fourth UFC fight. He's been finished twice already.

items.claim: Alvin Hines was suspended for one year for steroid use.
items.quote: guy just got suspended for a year for every single steroid in the book

items.claim: R.J. Harris has low hands and questionable durability.
items.quote: his hands are a little low and I don't really trust his durability

items.claim: R.J. Harris is a bigger and rangier fighter than Alvin Hines.
items.quote: He'll be the bigger guy, rangier guy.

items.claim: Anna Melisano is taking this fight on short notice.
items.quote: the thing with uh Anna Melisano is that she's taking this fight on short notice.

items.claim: Anna Melisano is moving up a weight class for this fight.
items.quote: she's taking it up a weight class

items.claim: Anna Melisano was submitted in round one of her last fight.
items.quote: getting steamrololled and submitted in round one
